Description: Set default values for Umbraco content properties by document type and property alias. Automatically populate properties when new content nodes are created. Supports Umbraco 13 (net8.0) and Umbraco 17 (net10.0).

AuthorDetails.Name: SplatDev
AuthorDetails.Description: SplatDev Ltda — building Umbraco plugins and tools for agencies and developers.
